creator: nemysis@gmx.ch
text:
On Tue, 19 Feb 2013 12:14:21 GMT
makc@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Synopsis: [MAINTAINER] games/asteroids3d: Changed Makefile, added Desktop entries, icons, removed all Notes
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->feedback
> State-Changed-By: makc
> State-Changed-When: Tue Feb 19 12:14:21 UTC 2013
> State-Changed-Why: 
> The patch doesn't apply anymore, could you update it? And for the
> future, can you please don't open several PR for the same port at once,
> instead submit new pathes as followup, or request to close older PR.
> Thanks!

New updated patch, old not apply more because Header is changed.

Added new

+DIST_SUBDIR=   ${PORTNAME}
"${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/${PORTNAME}.png" \
${LN} -sf ${PREFIX}/share/icons/hicolor/48x48/apps/${PORTNAME}.png ${PREFIX}/share/pixmaps/
